_comment: Apply this policy to revisex-notes-files to allow ONLY CloudFront (via OAC) to read objects. No direct S3 access for anyone.
_instructions: 1. Go to AWS S3 Console → revisex-notes-files → Permissions → Bucket Policy
2. Replace ACCOUNT_ID and DISTRIBUTION_ID with your actual values
3. Go to Block Public Access settings → Ensure ALL four blocks are ON
4. Test: try accessing a direct S3 URL — it must return 403 AccessDenied
